caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green t-shirt with the text "I ON NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK," a green cap, and headphones. The setting appears to be a casual, possibly retail environment, as there are racks of clothes and a mannequin in the background. The walls are adorned with numerous framed photographs, adding a personal touch to the space. In the first frame, the man is gesturing with his right hand, emphasizing a point, while in the second frame, he is looking off to the side, possibly listening or thinking. The overall atmosphere suggests an informal yet engaging conversation.
